question: Streaming data platform for real-time financial analytics
core_problem: Banks spend 3+ hours reconciling trade data across siloed systems; risk teams miss intraday limit breaches because latency is too high.
ten_x_vision: A single event-streaming backbone that gives every risk and compliance team sub-second visibility into all trade activity across asset classes.
milestones: Deploy Confluent Cloud cluster with 6 producer adapters (FIX, SWIFT, MQ)
Launch real-time risk dashboard with sub-500ms end-to-end latency

question: Developer productivity CLI for AI-assisted code context orchestration
core_problem: Engineers waste 30-60 min per session re-establishing context before LLM-assisted coding; context is ephemeral and does not compound across sessions.
ten_x_vision: A CLI that auto-generates, stores, and injects project context so every agent session starts with full institutional knowledge, making each run smarter than the last.
milestones: Ship pipeline: context generation to research to strategy to discipline
Persistent FTS5 memory store with auto-injection into subsequent runs
80% test coverage gate enforced via pre-commit
architecture_pattern: Event-driven orchestrator with pluggable adapters and SQLite FTS5 memory
